US: https://lmg.gg/shipstormus

If you want to get an even better offer, sign up for our Supporter Plus tier on floatplane at: https://www.lmg.gg/floatplane

The Flux Keyboard displays it all. Literally. It’s a keyboard yet transparent, and underneath IS a display featuring nearly any glyph or function you can imagine. Pretty cool, eh? I’d like to think so. However, it does type a bit differently than your typical mechanical switches... Thanks u/FranciumGoesBoom for lending it to us to check out! 

Labs Companion Article: https://www.lttlabs.com/products/keyboards/flux-keyboard
